seoTitle: Berwick vs Bet Bet — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Berwick vs Bet Bet: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Berwick and Bet Bet.
heading: Berwick vs Bet Bet — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Berwick, Victoria and Bet Bet, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Berwick has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Bet Bet (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Berwick or Bet Bet safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Berwick has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Bet Bet scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Berwick scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Bet Bet scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Berwick or Bet Bet?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Berwick has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
